clauses.consequence: Mixed Hopf/base/topographic structure cannot introduce an independent SM gauge curvature source.
clauses.limitation: This is a BHSM structural axiom, not an external theorem of the Standard Model.
clauses.statement: Local Standard Model bundle, gauge, and Dirac dynamics remain locally unchanged.

clauses.consequence: Mixed coefficient slots must map to existing BHSM operator packages or remain a real missing term.
clauses.limitation: The axiom classifies representation channels but does not prove the full H_T theorem by itself.
clauses.statement: Mixed topographic/geometric effects enter through existing scalar, boundary, profile, screening, or lift sectors.

clauses.consequence: A fitted or independent mixed coefficient is forbidden.
clauses.limitation: If representation fails, the result is a theorem gap or failure, not a tunable parameter.
clauses.statement: No new free Hopf/base/boundary/coframe coefficient may be introduced or fit.

limitations: The axiom is internal to BHSM and does not prove the complete H_T theorem alone.
It forbids fitted mixed coefficients and forces representation, screening, lift, PSD/profile control, or an explicit failure.
title: BHSM v2.11 Bundle-Separation / Topographic-Representation Axiom Report
